title: MACP Session Metadata
description: JSON Schema for SessionMetadata returned by GetSession. See RFC-MACP-0001 Section 9 and RFC-MACP-0006 Section 3.5.

started_at_unix_ms.description: Timestamp when the session was created (milliseconds since Unix epoch).

expires_at_unix_ms.description: Timestamp when the session will expire (milliseconds since Unix epoch). Computed as started_at_unix_ms + ttl_ms.

mode_version.description: Mode semantic version bound at SessionStart.

policy_version.description: Policy version bound at SessionStart. See RFC-MACP-0012.

participants.description: Declared participant identifiers bound at SessionStart.

participant_activity.description: Per-participant activity summaries for participants that have sent at least one accepted message.

initiator.description: The sender of the accepted SessionStart message. Used for cancellation authorization and audit.

last_message_at_unix_ms.description: Timestamp of the participant's most recent accepted message.

message_count.description: Number of accepted messages from this participant.
